title: Records Manager

config.title: Manual tracked area (advanced)
config.help: For edge cases only: creates or updates an area by hand. The recommended path is to import the record catalog, then enable the areas you want for the current tournament.

records.title: Tournament records
records.globalEmpty: The catalog is empty. Use “Import records” to fill it.
records.tournamentTitle: Step 2 — Records tracked for this tournament
records.tournamentEmpty: No record tracked yet. Enable areas in step 1.

broken.title: Broken records
broken.actionsHelp: First check the records broken during the tournament. If there are any, you can then promote them to the permanent catalog.

import.title: Import records
import.help: Import a CSV or JSON file, or paste its content. Easiest path: download the template, fill it in, then drop it here. A preview is shown before importing.

activation.title: Activate records for this tournament
activation.help: Copy selected global catalog records (RtTournament = 0) into the current tournament as a date-fixed snapshot. Ianseo ORIS printouts read the tournament snapshot.
activation.empty: No global record code available yet. Import records first.

current.areasTitle: Step 1 — Enable record areas for this tournament
current.areasHelp: Tick the areas to track during the tournament, then apply the selection.
current.noAreas: No record area available yet. Create one in the standings catalog view first.

standings.areasHelp: Create or remove global record areas. Deleting an area removes its global records, current tournament snapshots and monitoring rows.
standings.importExportHelp: Imports are stored in RecTournament with RtTournament = 0. Exports use the global catalog.
standings.confirmDeleteDetail: Area “{code}” and its {count} catalog record(s) will be deleted, along with their tournament tracking. This cannot be undone.

edit.title: Edit record
edit.help: The form uses the same canonical fields as CSV/JSON import and export. Holder, club/country and place are saved back into RtRecExtra.

intro: This module tracks records and detects the ones broken during your tournament. Start by enabling the record areas to track — if the catalog is empty, import it first from the Permanent catalog tab.
